creator: oh@btinternet.com
text:
Submitter-Id:   current-users
 Originator:     Orion Hodson
 Confidential:   no
 Synopsis:       Addition of newpcm mixer support and duplex probing to rat
 Severity:       non-critical
 Priority:       low
 Release:        FreeBSD 4.1-RELEASE i386
 Class:          change-request
 Category:       ports
 
 Description: 
 
 The port was suffering bit rot, caused by differences between the
 previous pcm driver and newpcm.  This replacement port adds newpcm
 mixer support and brings port upto date with the current rat release
 (4.2.9).
 
 Fix: 
 
 begin 644 rat.port.tgz
